posts.author: Dickson.Cody (Cody Dickson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
I am wanting to find a way to assign multiple people to an item, all with their own timelines, and be able to see each person’s timeline for each item in the timeline view. I have attached screenshots of my initial thinking, but I’m happy to get and wanting any other ideas or ways to achieve this.

I schedule for a joinery company where we have multiple staff install at the same job, but not always for the same amounts of time. My end goal is to have our factory screens show a timeline view listing every installer and their assigned jobs upcoming. However, when I assign multiple people to a job, I can have the multiple dates show up, but I can only group them by 1 person only, even when linking each date to a person column via deadline tool.

Can anyone think of a way to achieve this properly?

Monday - group1796×346 45.6 KB

Monday - Timeline1788×728 66.6 KB
